Comment: Quadcopter on a RealFlight multirotor model - rf0-3 are motors 1-4, direct from PX4 motor outputs. The "px4" values are HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS.controls[] indices and MUST match PWM_MAIN_FUNC* in ROMFS/px4fmu_common/init.d-posix/airframes/1201_flightaxis_quad: controls[0..3] = motors 1-4, each already [0,1].
RfModel: informational only - aircraft is selected inside RealFlight
